name: Client
description: Represents an individual or an organization that Reforma provides legal services to. A Client is the central entity for tracking matters, briefs, and financial interactions. Before creating a new Client, Bica should check for existing clients with similar names to prevent duplication.

id.description: The unique identifier (CUID) for the client.

name.description: The full legal name of the client or organization.

email.description: The primary contact email for the client. Must be unique within the system.

company.description: The name of the company if the client is an organization.

industry.description: The industry sector the client operates in.

status.description: The current status of the client relationship.
